events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the visible sequence violation is that low-voltage rewiring to add a true C-wire was started before de-energizing the transformer circuit and before confirming a spare conductor/transformer VA capacity — so the call is **fail** (medium risk, installed-defective), with the correct order being verify power off → diagnose → inventory wires → check spare conductor → verify transformer VA → install C-wire → verify R-C voltage → terminate at stat → restore power → verify full call sequence → document.
